section_title: Limit of Discretion of official liquidator.-- The Court may provide by any order that the official liquidator may
content:
263. Limit of Discretion of official liquidator.-- The Court may provide by any order that the official liquidator may
exercise any of the above powers without the sanction or intervention of the Court, and, where an official liquidator is
provisionally appointed, may limit and restrict his powers by the order appointing him.
